themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Do you maintain consciousness of God's presence throughout your daily activities?". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".
